---
title: Sidebar Navigation
description: Learn how to configure and customize your Starlight site's sidebar navigation, including links, groups, badges, and internationalization.
---

A well-organized sidebar is crucial for documentation as it's one of the main ways users navigate your site. Starlight provides comprehensive options to customize your sidebar layout and content.

## Default Sidebar

By default, Starlight automatically generates a sidebar based on your documentation's file structure, using each file's `title` property as the sidebar entry.

### Auto-Generated Example

Given this file structure:

```bash
src/content/docs/
├── constellations/
│   ├── andromeda.md
│   └── orion.md
└── stars/
    └── betelgeuse.md
```

Starlight automatically generates this sidebar:

- **constellations**
  - Andromeda
  - Orion
- **stars**
  - Betelgeuse

<Tip>
  Automatic sidebar generation is perfect for getting started quickly without manual configuration.
</Tip>

## Manual Sidebar Configuration

To configure your sidebar manually, use the `sidebar` property in `astro.config.mjs`:

```js title="astro.config.mjs"
import { defineConfig } from 'astro/config';
import starlight from '@astrojs/starlight';

export default defineConfig({
  integrations: [
    starlight({
      title: 'My Docs',
      sidebar: [
        // Your sidebar configuration
      ],
    }),
  ],
});
```

## Sidebar Items

### Internal Links

Link to pages in `src/content/docs/` using the `slug` property:

<CodeGroup>
```js "Using slug"
starlight({
  sidebar: [
    { slug: 'constellations/andromeda' },
    { slug: 'constellations/orion' },
  ],
});
```

```js "Shorthand"
starlight({
  sidebar: [
    'constellations/andromeda',
    'constellations/orion',
  ],
});
```
</CodeGroup>

Both configurations produce the same result. The page's `title` from frontmatter is automatically used as the label.

<Note>
  When using `slug`, you can override the label and add custom properties like `translations` and `attrs`.
</Note>

### External Links

Add links to external or non-docs pages using `label` and `link` properties:

```js title="astro.config.mjs"
starlight({
  sidebar: [
    // A link to a non-docs page on this site
    { label: 'Meteor Store', link: '/shop/' },
    // An external link to NASA
    { label: 'NASA', link: 'https://www.nasa.gov/' },
  ],
});
```

## Groups

Organize related links under collapsible headings using groups:

```js title="astro.config.mjs" {3-17}
starlight({
  sidebar: [
    {
      label: 'Constellations',
      items: [
        'constellations/carina',
        'constellations/centaurus',
        // Nested group
        {
          label: 'Seasonal',
          items: [
            'constellations/andromeda',
            'constellations/orion',
          ],
        },
      ],
    },
  ],
});
```

**Result:**
- **Constellations** (expandable)
  - Carina
  - Centaurus
  - **Seasonal** (nested expandable)
    - Andromeda
    - Orion

### Autogenerated Groups

Automatically generate a group from a directory:

```js title="astro.config.mjs"
starlight({
  sidebar: [
    {
      label: 'Constellations',
      autogenerate: { directory: 'constellations' },
    },
  ],
});
```

Given this structure:

```bash
src/content/docs/constellations/
├── carina.md
├── centaurus.md
└── seasonal/
    └── andromeda.md
```

Starlight generates:
- **Constellations**
  - Carina
  - Centaurus
  - **seasonal**
    - Andromeda

<Warning>
  Pages are sorted alphabetically by slug by default. Use frontmatter `sidebar.order` to customize sort order.
</Warning>

## Customizing Links via Frontmatter

Customize how pages appear in autogenerated sidebars using the `sidebar` frontmatter field:

```md title="src/content/docs/example.md"
---
title: My page
sidebar:
  label: Custom sidebar label
  order: 2
  badge:
    text: New
    variant: tip
  hidden: false
---
```

### Available Options

<CardGroup cols={2}>
  <Card title="label" icon="tag">
    Override the sidebar link text (defaults to page `title`)
  </Card>
  
  <Card title="order" icon="sort">
    Control sort order (lower numbers appear first)
  </Card>
  
  <Card title="badge" icon="award">
    Add a badge next to the link
  </Card>
  
  <Card title="hidden" icon="eye-off">
    Hide the page from autogenerated groups
  </Card>
  
  <Card title="attrs" icon="code">
    Add custom HTML attributes to the link
  </Card>
</CardGroup>

<Note>
  Frontmatter sidebar configuration only applies to links in autogenerated groups or defined with `slug`.
</Note>

## Badges

Add badges to links and groups to highlight important information:

<CodeGroup>
```js "Simple Badge"
starlight({
  sidebar: [
    {
      label: 'Stars',
      items: [
        {
          slug: 'stars/persei',
          badge: 'Supergiant',
        },
      ],
    },
  ],
});
```

```js "Badge with Variant"
starlight({
  sidebar: [
    {
      slug: 'stars/sirius',
      badge: { text: 'Stub', variant: 'caution' },
    },
  ],
});
```

```js "Group Badge"
starlight({
  sidebar: [
    {
      label: 'Moons',
      badge: 'Outdated',
      autogenerate: { directory: 'moons' },
    },
  ],
});
```
</CodeGroup>

### Badge Variants

Available badge variants:
- `default` - Uses site accent color
- `note` - Blue
- `tip` - Green
- `caution` - Yellow/Orange
- `danger` - Red
- `success` - Green

```js
badge: { text: 'New Feature', variant: 'tip' }
```

<Tip>
  You can also create custom badge styles using the `class` property. Learn more about [badges](/components/badges/).
</Tip>

## Collapsing Groups

Collapse groups by default using the `collapsed` property:

```js {4}
starlight({
  sidebar: [
    {
      label: 'Constellations',
      collapsed: true,
      items: ['constellations/andromeda', 'constellations/orion'],
    },
  ],
});
```

### Collapsing Autogenerated Groups

Autogenerated groups inherit their parent's `collapsed` value:

```js {4,7}
starlight({
  sidebar: [
    {
      label: 'Constellations',
      collapsed: true,
      autogenerate: { 
        directory: 'constellations',
        // This will also collapse autogenerated subgroups
      },
    },
  ],
});
```

Override for autogenerated subgroups:

```js {5}
starlight({
  sidebar: [
    {
      label: 'Constellations',
      collapsed: false,
      autogenerate: { 
        directory: 'constellations',
        collapsed: true  // Only subgroups are collapsed
      },
    },
  ],
});
```

## Custom HTML Attributes

Add custom HTML attributes to links using the `attrs` property:

```js {6}
starlight({
  sidebar: [
    {
      label: 'NASA',
      link: 'https://www.nasa.gov/',
      attrs: { target: '_blank', style: 'font-style: italic' },
    },
  ],
});
```

### For Autogenerated Links

Apply attributes to all autogenerated links:

```js {5}
starlight({
  sidebar: [
    {
      label: 'Constellations',
      autogenerate: {
        directory: 'constellations',
        attrs: { style: 'font-style: italic' },
      },
    },
  ],
});
```

Individual pages can override using `sidebar.attrs` in frontmatter:

```md
---
title: Special Page
sidebar:
  attrs:
    class: highlighted-link
---
```

## Internationalization

Translate sidebar labels for different languages using the `translations` property:

```js {3-5,9-11}
starlight({
  sidebar: [
    {
      label: 'Constellations',
      translations: {
        'pt-BR': 'Constelações',
        'es': 'Constelaciones',
      },
      items: [
        {
          label: 'Andromeda',
          translations: {
            'pt-BR': 'Andrômeda',
            'es': 'Andrómeda',
          },
          slug: 'constellations/andromeda',
        },
      ],
    },
  ],
});
```

### Automatic Translation for Internal Links

Internal links automatically use translated page titles from frontmatter:

```js
starlight({
  sidebar: [
    {
      label: 'Constellations',
      translations: { 'pt-BR': 'Constelações' },
      items: [
        // Uses page title from frontmatter automatically
        { slug: 'constellations/andromeda' },
        { slug: 'constellations/scorpius' },
      ],
    },
  ],
});
```

<Note>
  In multilingual sites, `slug` values don't include the language prefix. For example, use `intro` not `en/intro` or `pt-br/intro`.
</Note>

### Translating Badges

For multilingual sites, provide badge text as an object with language codes:

```js {6-9}
starlight({
  sidebar: [
    {
      slug: 'constellations/andromeda',
      badge: {
        text: {
          en: 'New',
          'pt-BR': 'Novo',
          'es': 'Nuevo',
        },
      },
    },
  ],
});
```

## Complete Configuration Example

Here's a comprehensive sidebar configuration showcasing multiple features:

```js title="astro.config.mjs"
import { defineConfig } from 'astro/config';
import starlight from '@astrojs/starlight';

export default defineConfig({
  integrations: [
    starlight({
      title: 'Astronomy Docs',
      sidebar: [
        // Simple link
        'getting-started',
        
        // External link
        { 
          label: 'NASA', 
          link: 'https://www.nasa.gov/',
          attrs: { target: '_blank' }
        },
        
        // Group with manual items
        {
          label: 'Guides',
          items: [
            { slug: 'guides/basics', badge: { text: 'New', variant: 'tip' } },
            { slug: 'guides/advanced' },
          ],
        },
        
        // Autogenerated group
        {
          label: 'Reference',
          collapsed: true,
          badge: 'API',
          autogenerate: { directory: 'reference' },
        },
        
        // Nested groups
        {
          label: 'Constellations',
          items: [
            'constellations/overview',
            {
              label: 'By Season',
              autogenerate: { 
                directory: 'constellations/seasonal',
                collapsed: true
              },
            },
          ],
        },
      ],
    }),
  ],
});
```
